zh.lifeSummary: Friederich II. von Weltin, Churfürst von Sachsen是Markgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnberg的兒子，於1412年8月22日出生在德國薩辛瑙包格阿爾騰包格。他於1431年6月3日與Margaretha Herzogin von Österreich在薩辛阿赤 萊格萊格結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1464年9月7日在德國薩辛可萊斯 梅斯梅斯享年52歲，埋葬在德國薩辛可萊斯 梅斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Friederich II. von Weltin, Churfürst von Sachsen是Markgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnberg的儿子，于1412年8月22日出生在德国薩辛瑙包格阿爾騰包格。他于1431年6月3日与Margaretha Herzogin von Österreich在薩辛阿赤 萊格萊格结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1464年9月7日在德国薩辛可萊斯 梅斯梅斯享年52岁，埋葬在德国薩辛可萊斯 梅斯。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Weltin,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Weldon  .
German: perhaps a variant of   Welden  .

variants.name: Weldon
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Northamptonshire called Weldon, from Old English well(a) ‘spring, stream’ + dūn ‘hill’. This name was brought to Ireland (Dublin) in the 14th century. It has been Gaelicized as de Bhéalatún.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Sachsen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: probably from a placename Sachenbach in southern Germany, the first part of which is from Old High German saher ‘reed grass’ or ‘swamp’.

nameMeanings.name: Friederich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

variants.name: Frederick
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

nameMeanings.name: II.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Friederich II. von Weltin, Churfürst von Sachsen was born on 22 August 1412, in Altenburg, Naumburg, Saxony, Germany as the son of Markgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnberg. He married Margaretha Herzogin von Österreich on 3 June 1431, in Leipzig, Amt Leipzig, Saxony. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 7 September 1464, in Meißen, Meißen, Saxony, Germany, at the age of 52, and was buried in Meißen, Saxony, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Friederich II. von Weltin, Churfürst von Sachsen est né le 22 août 1412, à Altenburg, Naumburg, Sachsen, Allemagne, fils de Markgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnberg. Il a épousé Margaretha Herzogin von Österreich le 3 juin 1431, à Leipzig, Amt Leipzig, Sachsen. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 7 septembre 1464, à Meißen, Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Friederich II. von Weltin, Churfürst von Sachsen wurde am 22. August 1412 in Altenburg, Naumburg, Sachsen, Deutschland, als Sohn von Markgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnberg geboren. Er hat am 3. Juni 1431 in Leipzig, Amt Leipzig, Sachsen Margaretha Herzogin von Österreich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 7. September 1464 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Meißen, Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Deutschland und wurde in Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Friederich II. von Weltin, Churfürst von Sachsen è nato il il 22 agosto 1412 nel Altenburg, Naumburg, Sachsen, Germania come figlio di Markgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnberg. Lui sposato Margaretha Herzogin von Österreich il 3 giugno 1431, nel Leipzig, Amt Leipzig, Sachsen. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 7 settembre 1464, nel Meißen, Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Germania, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Friederich II. von Weltin, Churfürst von Sachsenは1412年8月22日にドイツサチセンナウンブルグアルテンブルグでMarkgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnbergの息子として生まれた。1431年6月3日にサチセンアムト レイプズイグレイプズイグでMargaretha Herzogin von Österreichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1464年9月7日にドイツサチセンクレイス メイssンメイssンで52歳で死去し，ドイツサチセンクレイス メイssンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Friederich II. von Weltin, Churfürst von Sachsen(은)는 1412년 8월 22일 독일 작센 나버그 알텐버그에서 Markgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnberg의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1431년 6월 3일 작센 아트 레이p지그 레이p지그에서 Margaretha Herzogin von Österreich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1464년 9월 7일 독일 작센 크레이스 이ss 이ss에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 작센 크레이스 이ss에 묻혔다.

pt.22 August 1412–7. September 1464: 22 de agosto de 1412–7 de setembro de 1464
pt.Brandenburg, Heiligenbeil, East Prussia,: Brandenburg, Kreis Heiligenbeil, Ostpreußen, Preußen, Alemanha
pt.lifeSummary: Friederich II. von Weltin, Churfürst von Sachsen nasceu em 22 de agosto de 1412, em Altenburg, Naumburg, Sachsen, Alemanha filho de Markgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnberg. Ele casou-se com Margaretha Herzogin von Österreich em 3 de junho de 1431, em Leipzig, Amt Leipzig, Sachsen. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de setembro de 1464, em Meißen, Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Alemanha, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Alemanha.

ro.Brandenburg, Heiligenbeil, East Prussia,: Brandenburg, Kreis Heiligenbeil, Ostpreußen, Preußen, Germania

ru.Brandenburg, Heiligenbeil, East Prussia,: брэнденбург, крис хилидженбил, остпреуssен, Пруссия, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Friederich II. von Weltin, Churfürst von Sachsen родился 22 августа 1412 г. в местности алтенбург, наумбург, сачсен, Германия. Его отца звали Markgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnberg. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaretha Herzogin von Österreich 3 июня 1431 г. в местности липзиг, амт липзиг, сачсен. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 7 сентября 1464 г. в местности миssен, крис миssен, сачсен, Германия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности крис миssен, сачсен, Германия.

es.Brandenburg, Heiligenbeil, East Prussia,: Brandenburg, Kreis Heiligenbeil, Ostpreußen, Preußen, Alemania
es.lifeSummary: Friederich II. von Weltin, Churfürst von Sachsen nació el 22 de agosto de 1412, en Altenburg, Naumburg, Sachsen, Alemania como hijo de Markgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnberg. Se casó con Margaretha Herzogin von Österreich el 3 de junio de 1431, en Leipzig, Amt Leipzig, Sachsen. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 7 de septiembre de 1464, en Meißen, Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Alemania, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Alemania.
